def positive_python_perf_layer_data_structure_choice_pandas_object_dtype_for_numeric_hot_columns():
    rule_id = "python_perf_layer_data_structure_choice_pandas_object_dtype_for_numeric_hot_columns"
    family = "performance"
    severity = "contextual"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description = "Layer: Data structure choice. Flag numeric pandas columns kept as object dtype on transformation-heavy paths."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
